mapper.sql: id, name, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, role, created_at AS createdAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, password_hash, role, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, role = #{role}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
